airport.name: Beijing Capital International Airport (PEK)
airport.toCity: Take Airport Express to Dongzhimen in 25 mins; taxis metered but use Didi app.

transport.metro: Use Beijing Subway app; signs in English; avoid rush hours 7-9 AM and 5-7 PM.
transport.taxi: Hail taxis or use Didi app; ensure meter is running; show destination in Chinese.
transport.didi: Download Didi app before arrival; link international card; convenient for city-wide rides.
tips: Buy Yikatong card for metro/bus savings.
Use Baidu Maps for real-time navigation.
Avoid unlicensed taxis; use official stands.

payment.alipay: Download Alipay and use Tour Pass for foreign cards; widely accepted in shops.
payment.wechatPay: Set up WeChat Pay via WeChat app; scan QR codes to pay easily.
payment.cash: Carry small cash for street vendors; ATMs available but less used.
payment.foreignCard: Visa/Mastercard at hotels and malls; notify bank before travel to avoid blocks.

tips: Book near metro stations for easy access.
Try local eateries for authentic flavors.
Use food apps like Meituan for delivery.

commonScams: Avoid 'tea ceremony' invites; often overpriced scams.
Ignore unsolicited tour guide offers in tourist spots.
Check taxi meters or prefer Didi for transparency.

emergency.localTip: Keep hotel address in Chinese characters for quick help.

bestTimeToVisit: Spring (April-May) and Autumn (September-October) for mild weather and fewer crowds.
touristTips: Learn basic Mandarin phrases like hello and thank you.
Respect local customs and queue politely.
Stay hydrated and use sunscreen in summer.
Carry a copy of your passport for ID checks.
Use hotel concierge for booking and advice.
